zh.lifeSummary: 當Lydia Joann Sayers於1556年2月12日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍可頓時，她的父親John Bourchier Sayer27歲，母親Elizabeth Hawkins17歲。她和Robert Browne至少有3個兒子。她去世於1611年5月15日在她的家鄉享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sayers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Sayer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This name is also established in Ireland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Saoghair; see Sears .

variants.name: Sayres
meanings: English: variant of   Sayers  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sayer
meanings: English: common occupational name from Middle English sayer, a phonetic variant of Sawyer , which in Wales and neighboring English counties may have been reinforced by the synonymous Welsh saer ‘carpenter’ and everywhere by a possible borrowing into Middle English of Old French seieor, saieur ‘sawyer’.

English: rare occupational name perhaps denoting an assayer of metals, or a servant who tasted his lord's food before serving, from Middle English saiour ‘assayer, tester’ (a shortened form of Old French assaiour, ultimately from Late Latin exagium, a derivative of exagmināre ‘to weigh’).
English: rare occupational name for a professional reciter or minstrel, from Middle English seier(e) ‘speaker’.

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Joann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

en.lifeSummary: When Lydia Joann Sayers was born on 12 February 1556, in Hawkedon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Bourchier Sayer, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Hawkins, was 17. She had at least 3 sons with Robert Browne. She died on 15 May 1611, in her hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lydia Joann Sayers est née le 12 février 1556, à Hawkedon, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Bourchier Sayer, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hawkins, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Robert Browne. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1611, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lydia Joann Sayers am 12. Februar 1556 in Hawkedon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bourchier Sayer 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hawkins 17. Sie hatte mit Robert Browne mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1611 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Joann Sayers è nata il il 12 febbraio 1556 nel Hawkedon, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Bourchier Sayer, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Hawkins, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Robert Browne. Morì il 15 maggio 1611, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Joann Sayers(이)가 1556년 2월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 호케던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bourchier Sayer(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hawkins(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Robert Browne(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1611년 5월 15일 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lydia Joann Sayers родилась 12 февраля 1556 г. в местности ховкедон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Bourchier Sayer было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hawkins, 17.
